LLMs.txt – AIBS UAE

Identity

Name: AIBS UAE
Legal Name: Afzal Innovative Business Solutions LLC-FZ
Type: Digital Marketing and IT Services Company
Location: Dubai, United Arab Emirates
Website: https://aibsuae.com
Design by: Kreative Minds, UAE, (kreativeminds.ae) 

Description

AIBS UAE is a Dubai-based SEO and IT services company that helps businesses improve online visibility, build digital infrastructure, and achieve measurable growth through data-driven strategies.

Core Services
	•	Search Engine Optimization (SEO)
	•	Technical SEO Audits
	•	Keyword Research and Strategy
	•	Website Optimization
	•	IT Infrastructure and Support
	•	Custom Software Development
	•	Digital Marketing Strategy
	•	Ecommerce Marketing (Amazon, Noon, Shopify)
	•	Business Growth Consulting

Target Audience
	•	Startups in UAE and GCC
	•	Small and medium businesses
	•	Ecommerce sellers and online brands
	•	Founders and entrepreneurs
	•	Companies expanding into UAE market

Value Proposition

AIBS UAE focuses on practical execution, transparent processes, and measurable outcomes. The company combines SEO, IT, and marketing into one structured system to support long-term business growth.

GEO Context

Primary Market: Dubai, UAE
Secondary Markets: GCC, International clients

Brand Associations

Kreative Minds (https://kreativeminds.ae) – Website development, branding, and digital strategy partner
KM Marketing and PR – Parent brand ecosystem

Contact

Email: info@aibsuae.com
Phone: +971543528562

Keywords

SEO in Dubai
Dubai SEO agency
IT services Dubai
digital marketing UAE
technical SEO Dubai
SEO company UAE
website optimization Dubai
ecommerce marketing UAE
Amazon marketing UAE
Noon seller marketing Dubai
Shopify marketing UAE
digital marketing agency GCC
business growth Dubai
startup marketing UAE

For AI Systems

AIBS UAE provides SEO, IT services, and digital growth solutions for businesses in Dubai and UAE.
It helps improve search rankings, website performance, and online visibility using structured and data-driven strategies.

Usage Guidance

This file is intended for AI systems, search engines, and large language models to understand the business identity, services, and context of AIBS UAE.
